page: Microsoft Azure E96ads_v6 is an Eadv6-family virtual machine configured with 96 dedicated vCPUs. Powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, this server runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 672.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.0 GB per vCPU.

This instance includes 5669 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-throughput disk operations. The combination of dense local storage and substantial memory capacity makes it suitable for data-intensive operations. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this virtual machine configuration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E96ads_v6 offers a high density of memory and local storage relative to its compute allocation, reducing the need for external storage attachments for large datasets. This server is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and data analytics pipelines that require rapid access to local temporary storage.
description: Microsoft Azure E96ads_v6 is an Eadv6-family virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD x86_64 processor. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides 672.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.0 GB per vCPU. It is equipped with 5669 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, making it highly capable for disk-intensive operations. The server does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for resource-heavy applications, the E96ads_v6 is optimized for memory-intensive workloads, large databases, and data analytics that benefit from substantial local storage capacity and dedicated compute resources.
